queue.title: TODO scan: tighten exclusions based on FP rate data
queue.description: The todo_false_positive_rate metric shows 51% combined FP rate (elevated). Queue-level FP rate is 78% (18/23 todo-scan items retired). Use per-item text from todo-tracker.json to identify new exclusion patterns or widen existing ones in todo-false-positives.json. Alternatively raise ingest threshold in queue-pipeline.mjs to require more specific TODO comments.

outcome.note: Three-layer fix: 9 new patterns in todo-false-positives.json, 7 new grep filters + 2 EXCLUDE_PATHS in 27-todo-scan.sh, specificity gate (isSpecificEnough) in queue-pipeline.mjs requiring file refs/identifiers/URL paths/4+ non-stop words. Forward-looking fix — historical 78% rate will decay as new items are processed with tighter filters.

queue.title: Integrate audit-cost-escalation.mjs into A session pre-hook
queue.description: audit-cost-escalation.mjs currently needs manual invocation by A sessions. Add it as an A-type-only pre-session hook that runs before audit starts, so cost trend wq items exist when A session reads the queue. Thin hook wrapper: call `node audit-cost-escalation.mjs`, log output.

queue.title: Pre-compute human-review validation in audit-stats.mjs
queue.description: Currently validate-human-review.mjs --json is called on-demand during A session Section 5. Integrate it into audit-stats.mjs pre-computed output so A sessions see HR validation status alongside other stats at session start, reducing ad-hoc visual inspection overriding the validator.

queue.title: Substitution auto-circuit-breaker
queue.description: (added ~s1832): When backup_substitution_rate surfaces a circuit_break_recommended verdict, an A session could auto-disable the platform in picker config (set ROI override to 0 or add to skip list) rather than creating a wq item for manual action. Would close the loop from detection to remediation.

queue.title: Slim SESSION_AUDIT_SUBCHECKS.md — 3202 tokens (over 3000 budget)
queue.description: Auto-generated: SESSION_AUDIT_SUBCHECKS.md is 3202 tokens, exceeding the 3000-token prompt budget. Extract sections, compress, or split to reduce cognitive load.

queue.title: Audit hook consolidation candidates — identify hooks to merge
queue.description: Map all 73 hooks. Identify groups that share session-type gates (e.g. multiple _E.sh hooks that could merge into existing dispatchers, multiple generic hooks that run similar JSON parsing). Produce a consolidation plan with target groups, estimated line reduction, and risk assessment. d074 deliverable (1) prep work.
